questions.question: She ____ a book for two hours by the time her mother arrives tomorrow.
questions.explanation: ভবিষ্যতে কোনো নির্দিষ্ট সময়ের পূর্ব পর্যন্ত (by the time her mother arrives) কোনো কাজ দীর্ঘ সময় ধরে চলতে থাকবে বোঝালে Future Perfect Continuous হয়। গঠন: subject + will have been + verb-ing।

questions.question: They ____ football for an hour before the storm starts.
questions.explanation: ঝড় শুরু হওয়ার পূর্ব পর্যন্ত তারা এক ঘণ্টা ধরে খেলতে থাকবে। ভবিষ্যৎ শর্তাধীন সময়ের পূর্বের দীর্ঘ চলমান কাজের জন্য 'will have been playing' সঠিক।

questions.question: I ____ for the exam since morning by the time you wake up tomorrow.
questions.explanation: আগামীকাল তোমার ঘুম থেকে ওঠার আগে আমি সকাল থেকে পড়তে থাকব। ভবিষ্যতের দীর্ঘ চলমান কাজ বোঝাতে 'will have been studying' বসে।

questions.question: He ____ in this company for ten years by next month.
questions.explanation: আগামী মাসের মধ্যে এই কোম্পানিতে তার ১০ বছর ধরে কাজ করা হতে থাকবে। সময়ের স্থিতি বোঝাতে Future Perfect Continuous 'will have been working' বসে।

questions.question: The children ____ in the rain for an hour when we call them back.
questions.explanation: আমরা যখন ডেকে নেব তখন শিশুরা এক ঘণ্টা ধরে বৃষ্টিতে খেলতে থাকবে। ভবিষ্যতের সীমার আগের দীর্ঘ চলমান কাজ বোঝাতে 'will have been playing' সঠিক।

questions.question: My mother ____ dinner in the kitchen all evening by the time guests arrive.
questions.explanation: অতিথিরা পৌঁছানোর আগেই মা সারা সন্ধ্যা ধরে রান্না করতে থাকবেন। Future Perfect Continuous গঠনে 'will have been cooking' সঠিক।

questions.question: We ____ the movie for thirty minutes before you join us.
questions.explanation: তুমি আমাদের সাথে যোগ দেওয়ার আগেই আমাদের ৩০ মিনিট ধরে সিনেমাটি দেখা হতে থাকবে। 'will have been watching' সঠিক রূপ।

questions.question: The baby ____ for an hour before the mother returns tomorrow.
questions.explanation: আগামীকাল মায়ের ফেরার আগে শিশুটি এক ঘণ্টা ধরে কাঁদতে থাকবে। ভবিষ্যৎ সময় নির্দেশক চলমান কাজ — 'will have been crying'।

questions.question: You ____ on the phone for a long time by the time I reach.
questions.explanation: আমি পৌঁছানোর আগেই তুমি দীর্ঘ সময় ধরে ফোনে কথা বলতে থাকবে। ভবিষ্যতের দীর্ঘ চলমান কাজের জন্য 'will have been talking' সঠিক।

questions.question: It ____ since morning by the time we leave tomorrow.
questions.explanation: আগামীকাল আমাদের রওনা দেওয়ার আগে সকাল থেকে বৃষ্টি হতে থাকবে। আবহাওয়ার দীর্ঘ ভবিষ্যৎ চলমান অবস্থা — 'will have been raining'।

questions.question: The students ____ to the lecture since 10 AM by the time class ends.
questions.explanation: ক্লাস শেষ হওয়ার আগে সকাল ১০টা থেকে ছাত্ররা লেকচার শুনতে থাকবে। দীর্ঘ ভবিষ্যৎ চলমান কাজ বোঝাতে 'will have been listening' সঠিক।

questions.question: He ____ a letter for thirty minutes when his ride arrives.
questions.explanation: গাড়ি আসার পূর্ব পর্যন্ত সে ৩০ মিনিট ধরে চিঠিটি লিখতে থাকবে। ভবিষ্যতের পূর্বের চলমান কাজ — 'will have been writing'।

questions.question: They ____ this bridge for two years by next December.
questions.explanation: আগামী ডিসেম্বরের মধ্যে দুই বছর ধরে তারা এই সেতুটি তৈরি করতে থাকবে। Future Perfect Continuous অনুযায়ী 'will have been building' হবে।

questions.question: I ____ for my keys all morning by the time you arrive.
questions.explanation: তুমি যখন পৌঁছাবে তখন আমি সারা সকাল ধরে চাবি খুঁজতে থাকব। দীর্ঘ ভবিষ্যৎ চলমান খোঁজার কাজ — 'will have been looking'।

questions.question: She ____ a red dress for hours by the time the party ends.
questions.explanation: পার্টি শেষ হওয়ার আগেই সে কয়েক ঘণ্টা ধরে লাল পোশাকটি পরা অবস্থায় থাকবে। 'will have been wearing' সঠিক।

questions.question: The birds ____ since sunrise by the time we wake up tomorrow.
questions.explanation: আগামীকাল আমাদের ঘুম থেকে ওঠার আগেই সূর্যোদয় থেকে পাখিগুলো ডাকতে থাকবে। Future Perfect Continuous 'will have been singing' সঠিক।

questions.question: We ____ for the bus for an hour by 10 AM tomorrow.
questions.explanation: আগামীকাল সকাল ১০টার মধ্যে আমাদের এক ঘণ্টা বাসের জন্য অপেক্ষা করা হতে থাকবে। 'will have been waiting' সঠিক রূপ।

questions.question: He ____ his room all day by the time his parents arrive tonight.
questions.explanation: আজ রাতে মা-বাবা পৌঁছানোর আগেই সে সারা দিন ধরে তার ঘর পরিষ্কার করতে থাকবে। 'will have been cleaning' সঠিক।

questions.question: The dog ____ in the garden for hours by sunset.
questions.explanation: সূর্যাস্তের আগেই কুকুরটি বাগানে কয়েক ঘণ্টা ধরে দৌড়াতে থাকবে। 'will have been running' (double n) সঠিক।

questions.question: I ____ lunch for thirty minutes by the time you join me.
questions.explanation: তুমি যখন আমার সাথে যোগ দেবে তখন আমার ৩০ মিনিট ধরে দুপুরের খাবার খাওয়া হতে থাকবে। খাওয়া অর্থে 'will have been having' সঠিক।

questions.question: She ____ to different cities for months by next year.
questions.explanation: আগামী বছরের মধ্যে সে কয়েক মাস ধরে বিভিন্ন শহরে ভ্রমণ করতে থাকবে। দীর্ঘ ভ্রমণ পরিকল্পনা — 'will have been travelling'।

questions.question: They ____ a surprise party for days before it happens.
questions.explanation: অনুষ্ঠানটি ঘটার আগে তারা বেশ কয়েক দিন ধরে সারপ্রাইজ পার্টির পরিকল্পনা করতে থাকবে। 'will have been planning' সঠিক।

questions.question: He ____ hard to improve his grades for a semester by next month.
questions.explanation: আগামী মাসের মধ্যে এক সেমিস্টার ধরে সে তার গ্রেড উন্নত করতে কঠোর পরিশ্রম করতে থাকবে। 'will have been working' সঠিক।

questions.question: You ____ too much noise all day if you don't stop soon.
questions.explanation: তুমি যদি শীঘ্রই না থামো তবে তোমার সারা দিন ধরে প্রচণ্ড গোলমাল করা হতে থাকবে। ভবিষ্যৎ ধারাবাহিক কাজ — 'will have been making'।

questions.question: The company ____ new employees for months by next winter.
questions.explanation: আগামী শীতের মধ্যে কোম্পানিটি কয়েক মাস ধরে কর্মী নিয়োগ করতে থাকবে। ভবিষ্যতের দীর্ঘমেয়াদী ধারাবাহিক কাজ — 'will have been hiring'।

questions.question: I ____ progress in English since I joined this class by next July.
questions.explanation: আগামী জুলাই মাসের মধ্যে যোগদানের সময় থেকে আমি ইংরেজিতে ভালো উন্নতি করতে থাকব। 'will have been making' সঠিক।

questions.question: She ____ for her exams all week by tomorrow.
questions.explanation: আগামীকালের মধ্যে সারা সপ্তাহ ধরে সে পরীক্ষার প্রস্তুতি নিতে থাকবে। দীর্ঘ ভবিষ্যৎ প্রস্তুতি — 'will have been preparing'।

questions.question: The world's climate ____ rapidly for decades by 2050.
questions.explanation: ২০৫০ সালের মধ্যে জলবায়ু কয়েক দশক ধরে দ্রুত পরিবর্তিত হতে থাকবে। দীর্ঘ ও ধারাবাহিক পরিবর্তন — 'will have been changing'।

questions.question: He ____ more and more impatient as the hours pass by tomorrow.
questions.explanation: আগামীকাল সময় কেটে যাওয়ার সাথে সাথে সে ক্রমশ অধৈর্য হয়ে উঠতে থাকবে। ভবিষ্যতের ক্রমান্বয়িক পরিবর্তন — 'will have been getting' সঠিক।

questions.question: I ____ this novel for a month by next Friday.
questions.explanation: আগামী শুক্রবারের মধ্যে এক মাস ধরে আমি এই উপন্যাসটি পড়তে থাকব। ভবিষ্যতের সমাপ্ত বিন্দুর পূর্ব পর্যন্ত চলমান কাজ — 'will have been reading'।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'She will have been reading a book for an hour.'
questions.explanation: 'will have been reading' এবং 'for an hour' — এটি Future Perfect Continuous Tense-এর নিখুঁত গঠন।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'They will have been playing football since morning.'
questions.explanation: 'will have been playing' এবং 'since morning' ভবিষ্যতের দীর্ঘ চলমান কাজ নির্দেশ করায় এটি Future Perfect Continuous।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'I will have been studying for my exam all morning.'
questions.explanation: ভবিষ্যতে নির্দিষ্ট সীমার পূর্বে সারা সকাল ধরে পড়াশোনা করার দীর্ঘ কাজ বোঝাতে 'will have been studying' ব্যবহৃত হয়েছে — Future Perfect Continuous।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'He will have been going to the gym for months.'
questions.explanation: ভবিষ্যতে কোনো এক সময়ের আগে কয়েক মাস ধরে নিয়মিত জিমে যাওয়া নির্দেশ করতে 'will have been going' ব্যবহৃত হয়।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'The baby will have been crying for thirty minutes.'
questions.explanation: ভবিষ্যতে কোনো নির্দিষ্ট সময়ে শিশুটির ৩০ মিনিট ধরে কাঁদার কাজ চলতে থাকবে। 'will have been crying' থাকায় এটি Future Perfect Continuous Tense।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'We will have been watching a movie since afternoon.'
questions.explanation: ভবিষ্যতে বিকেলের শুরু থেকে আমাদের সিনেমা দেখার কাজ চলতে থাকবে — Future Perfect Continuous।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'It will have been raining outside all day.'
questions.explanation: ভবিষ্যতে সারা দিন ধরে বাইরে বৃষ্টি হতে থাকবে — 'had been raining' এর ভবিষ্যৎ রূপ 'will have been raining' থাকার কারণে এটি Future Perfect Continuous।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'The students will have been listening carefully.'
questions.explanation: ভবিষ্যতে কোনো নির্দিষ্ট সময় পর্যন্ত ছাত্ররা মনোযোগ দিয়ে শুনতে থাকবে। 'will have been listening' দ্বারা এটি Future Perfect Continuous Tense।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'She will have been wearing that dress all day.'
questions.explanation: পোশাকটি সারা দিন ধরে পরিহিত অবস্থায় থাকবে। 'will have been wearing' ও 'all day' দ্বারা এটি Future Perfect Continuous।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'They will have been planning to travel since 2028.'
questions.explanation: ২০২৮ সাল থেকে তারা ভ্রমণের পরিকল্পনা করতে থাকবে। ভবিষ্যতের দীর্ঘ কাজ — Future Perfect Continuous।

questions.question: Arrange: (for / will / she / been / reading / hours / two / have)
options: She will have been reading for two hours.
She reading will have been for two hours.
She will have been for two hours reading.
She will have reading been for two hours.
questions.correctAnswer: She will have been reading for two hours.
questions.explanation: সভিক গঠন: Subject (She) + will have been + verb-ing (reading) + duration (for two hours)।

questions.question: Arrange: (playing / they / will / football / since / been / morning / have)
options: They will have been playing football since morning.
They playing will have been football since morning.
They will have playing been football since morning.
They will have been football playing since morning.
questions.correctAnswer: They will have been playing football since morning.
questions.explanation: সঠিক ক্রম: Subject (They) + will have been + verb-ing (playing) + Object (football) + since morning।

questions.question: Arrange: (waiting / I / for / will / been / the / bus / for hours / have)
options: I will have been waiting for the bus for hours.
I waiting will have been for the bus for hours.
I will have waiting been for the bus for hours.
I will have been for the bus waiting for hours.
questions.correctAnswer: I will have been waiting for the bus for hours.
questions.explanation: সঠিক গঠন: Subject (I) + will have been + verb-ing (waiting) + for the bus + for hours।

questions.question: Arrange: (kitchen / will / mother / been / cooking / in / the / my / all morning / have)
options: My mother will have been cooking in the kitchen all morning.
My mother cooking will have been in the kitchen all morning.
My mother will have been in the kitchen cooking all morning.
My mother will have been cooking in the kitchen all morning.
questions.correctAnswer: My mother will have been cooking in the kitchen all morning.
questions.explanation: সঠিক ক্রম: Subject (My mother) + will have been + verb-ing (cooking) + place + duration।

questions.question: Arrange: (all day / they / a / planning / party / been / have / will)
options: They will have been planning a party all day.
They planning will have been a party all day.
They will have planning been a party all day.
They will have been planning a party all day.
questions.correctAnswer: They will have been planning a party all day.
questions.explanation: সঠিক গঠন: Subject (They) + will have been + verb-ing (planning) + Object + duration (all day)।

questions.question: Arrange: (changing / climate / will / the / been / rapidly / for decades / have)
options: The climate will have been changing rapidly for decades.
The climate changing will have been rapidly for decades.
The climate will have been rapidly changing for decades.
The climate will have been changing rapidly for decades.
questions.correctAnswer: The climate will have been changing rapidly for decades.
questions.explanation: সঠিক ক্রম: Subject (The climate) + will have been + verb-ing (changing) + adverb + duration (for decades)।

questions.question: Find the error: 'She will has been reading a book for hours.'
options: She will have been reading a book for hours.
She is been reading a book for hours.
She has been reading a book for hours.
She was reading a book for hours.
questions.correctAnswer: She will have been reading a book for hours.
questions.explanation: Future Perfect Continuous-এ subject যাই হোক না কেন, 'will' এর সাথে 'have' বসে, 'has' ভুল। 'She will have been reading' সঠিক।

questions.question: Find the error: 'They will been playing football since morning.'
options: They will have been playing football since morning.
They were been playing football since morning.
They have been playing football since morning.
questions.correctAnswer: They will have been playing football since morning.
questions.explanation: ভবিষ্যতের দীর্ঘ চলমান কাজ বোঝাতে 'will' এর পর 'have been' বসে। 'They will have been playing' সঠিক।

questions.question: Find the error: 'I will has been studying for hours.'
options: I will have been studying for hours.
I has been studying for hours.
questions.correctAnswer: I will have been studying for hours.
questions.explanation: ভবিষ্যতে কোনো কাজ দীর্ঘ সময় ধরে চলতে থাকবে বোঝাতে 'I will have been studying' সঠিক রূপ।

questions.question: Find the error: 'He will have been go to school since Monday.'
options: He will have been going to school since Monday.
He is going to school since Monday.
He will have go to school since Monday.
He goes to school since Monday.
questions.correctAnswer: He will have been going to school since Monday.
questions.explanation: 'will have been' এর পরে verb-এর সাথে 'ing' যুক্ত করা আবশ্যক। 'go' → 'going' হবে।

questions.question: Find the error: 'The children will having been playing in the park.'
options: The children will have been playing in the park.
The children have been playing in the park.
The children was playing in the park.
The children playing in the park.
questions.correctAnswer: The children will have been playing in the park.
questions.explanation: সাহায্যকারী verb হিসেবে 'will having' বলে কিছু নেই। সঠিক গঠনটি হলো 'will have been' + V-ing।

questions.question: Find the error: 'We will be been watching a movie for hours.'
options: We will have been watching a movie for hours.
We were watching a movie for hours.
We have been watching a movie for hours.
We watching a movie for hours.
questions.correctAnswer: We will have been watching a movie for hours.
questions.explanation: 'will be been' বলে কোনো ব্যাকরণগত রূপ নেই। ভবিষ্যতের দীর্ঘ চলমান কাজ বোঝাতে 'will have been watching' হবে।

questions.question: Find the error: 'It will have being raining all day.'
options: It will have been raining all day.
It have been raining all day.
questions.correctAnswer: It will have been raining all day.
questions.explanation: Future Perfect Continuous-এর গঠন অনুযায়ী 'have' এর পর 'being' নয়, 'been' বসে (will + have + been + verb-ing)।

questions.question: Find the error: 'She will have been swiming for an hour.'
options: She will have been swimming for an hour.
She has been swimming for an hour.
She is swimming for an hour.
She will have been swim for an hour.
questions.correctAnswer: She will have been swimming for an hour.
questions.explanation: বানানগত ভুল: 'swim'-এর সাথে 'ing' যুক্ত করার সময় m ডাবল হবে (swimming)। 'swiming' ভুল বানান।

questions.question: Find the error: 'He will have been writeing a letter for an hour.'
options: He will have been writing a letter for an hour.
He was writing a letter for an hour.
He writes a letter for an hour.
He has been writing a letter for an hour.
questions.correctAnswer: He will have been writing a letter for an hour.
questions.explanation: বানানগত ভুল: 'write' এর শেষে silent 'e' বাদ দিয়ে 'ing' যোগ করতে হয় (writing)। 'writeing' ভুল।

questions.question: Find the error: 'They will been making too much noise all day.'
options: They will have been making too much noise all day.
They have been making too much noise all day.
They was making too much noise all day.
They making too much noise all day.
questions.correctAnswer: They will have been making too much noise all day.
questions.explanation: 'will been making' কোনো সঠিক রূপ নয়। সারা দিন ধরে গোলমাল করার ভবিষ্যৎ কাজ বোঝাতে 'will have been making' বসবে।

questions.question: Translate: 'মা আসার আগে সে দুই ঘণ্টা ধরে একটি বই পড়তে থাকবে।'
options: She will have been reading a book for two hours before her mother comes.
She was reading a book for two hours before her mother comes.
She reads a book for two hours before her mother comes.
She has been reading a book for two hours before her mother comes.
questions.correctAnswer: She will have been reading a book for two hours before her mother comes.
questions.explanation: মা আসার পূর্বের দীর্ঘ চলমান কাজ — Future Perfect Continuous। 'She will have been reading... before her mother comes (Present Indefinite)' সঠিক।

questions.question: Translate: 'ঝড় শুরু হওয়ার আগে তারা সকাল থেকে ফুটবল খেলতে থাকবে।'
options: They will have been playing football since morning before the storm begins.
They were playing football since morning before the storm begins.
They played football since morning before the storm begins.
They have been playing football since morning before the storm begins.
questions.correctAnswer: They will have been playing football since morning before the storm begins.
questions.explanation: ঝড় শুরু হওয়ার আগের সকাল থেকে চলা কাজ — Future Perfect Continuous। 'They will have been playing... since morning' সঠিক অনুবাদ।

questions.question: Translate: 'আমি ঘুমানোর আগে সকাল থেকে পড়াশোনা করতে থাকব।'
options: I will have been studying since morning before I sleep.
I was studying since morning before I sleep.
I studied since morning before I sleep.
I have been studying since morning before I sleep.
questions.correctAnswer: I will have been studying since morning before I sleep.
questions.explanation: ঘুমানোর আগের সকাল থেকে চলা কাজ — Future Perfect Continuous। 'I will have been studying... before I sleep' সঠিক।

questions.question: Translate: 'আমাদের বাইরে যাওয়ার আগে সারা দিন ধরে বৃষ্টি হতে থাকবে।'
options: It will have been raining all day before we go out.
It was raining all day before we go out.
It rained all day before we go out.
It has been raining all day before we go out.
questions.correctAnswer: It will have been raining all day before we go out.
questions.explanation: বাইরে যাওয়ার আগের সারা দিনের বৃষ্টি — Future Perfect Continuous। 'It will have been raining all day before we go out' সঠিক অনুবাদ।

questions.question: Translate: 'অতিথিরা আসার আগে মা সারা সন্ধ্যা রান্না করতে থাকবেন।'
options: My mother will have been cooking all evening before the guests arrive.
My mother was cooking all evening before the guests arrive.
My mother cooked all evening before the guests arrive.
My mother has been cooking all evening before the guests arrive.
questions.correctAnswer: My mother will have been cooking all evening before the guests arrive.
questions.explanation: অতিথিদের আসার আগের দীর্ঘ কাজ — Future Perfect Continuous। 'My mother will have been cooking' সঠিক অনুবাদ।

questions.question: Translate: 'বিদ্যুৎ যাওয়ার আগে আমরা এক ঘণ্টা ধরে সিনেমা দেখতে থাকব।'
options: We will have been watching a movie for an hour before the power goes out.
We were watching a movie for an hour before the power goes out.
We watched a movie for an hour before the power goes out.
We have been watching a movie for an hour before the power goes out.
questions.correctAnswer: We will have been watching a movie for an hour before the power goes out.
questions.explanation: বিদ্যুৎ চলে যাওয়ার আগের দীর্ঘ কাজ — Future Perfect Continuous। 'We will have been watching' সঠিক অনুবাদ।

questions.question: Translate: 'অসুস্থ হওয়ার আগে সে কয়েক দিন ধরে পরীক্ষার প্রস্তুতি নিতে থাকবে।'
options: She will have been preparing for exams for a few days before she falls ill.
She was preparing for exams for a few days before she falls ill.
She prepared for exams for a few days before she falls ill.
She has been preparing for exams for a few days before she falls ill.
questions.correctAnswer: She will have been preparing for exams for a few days before she falls ill.
questions.explanation: অসুস্থ হওয়ার আগের কয়েক দিনের দীর্ঘ প্রস্তুতি — Future Perfect Continuous। 'She will have been preparing' সঠিক।

questions.question: Translate: 'বিজ্ঞানীরা সতর্ক করার আগে আবহাওয়া অনেক বছর ধরে পরিবর্তিত হতে থাকবে।'
options: The weather will have been changing for many years before scientists warn us.
The weather was changing for many years before scientists warn us.
The weather changed for many years before scientists warn us.
The weather has been changing for many years before scientists warn us.
questions.correctAnswer: The weather will have been changing for many years before scientists warn us.
questions.explanation: বিজ্ঞানীদের সতর্ক করার পূর্বের দীর্ঘ ধারাবাহিক পরিবর্তন — Future Perfect Continuous। 'The weather will have been changing' সঠিক।

questions.question: Translate: 'আমি চাকরিটি পাওয়ার আগে এক বছর ধরে ইংরেজি শিখতে থাকব।'
options: I will have been learning English for a year before I get the job.
I was learning English for a year before I get the job.
I learned English for a year before I get the job.
I have been learning English for a year before I get the job.
questions.correctAnswer: I will have been learning English for a year before I get the job.
questions.explanation: চাকরি পাওয়ার আগের দীর্ঘ এক বছরের ইংরেজি শেখা — Future Perfect Continuous। 'I will have been learning' সঠিক অনুবাদ।

questions.question: Choose the correct sentence:
options: She will have been reading a book since 2 PM before I come.
She is been reading a book since 2 PM before I come.
She has been reading a book since 2 PM before I come.
She was reading a book since 2 PM before I come.
questions.correctAnswer: She will have been reading a book since 2 PM before I come.
questions.explanation: Quick: Future Perfect Continuous = subject + will have been + verb-ing + since + time + before + Present Simple।

questions.question: Choose the correct form: 'They ____ football for hours when the bell rings.'
questions.explanation: Quick: ঘণ্টা বাজার আগের দীর্ঘ খেলা — Future Perfect Continuous। 'They' এর সাথে 'will have been playing' সঠিক।

questions.question: Pick the correct negative: 'She ____ her homework for an hour when it becomes dark.'
questions.explanation: Quick: Future Perfect Continuous negative = subject + will not + have been + verb-ing। 'She will not have been doing' সঠিক।

questions.question: Pick the correct question form: '____ he been writing for an hour before his pen breaks?'
questions.explanation: Quick: Future Perfect Continuous question = Will + subject + have been + verb-ing? প্রশ্নবোধক করতে শুরুতে 'Will' বসে।

questions.question: Which sentence shows an action continuing up to another future point?
options: I will have been living here for ten years before I move.
I lived here ten years ago.
I am living here for ten years.
I have been living here for ten years.
questions.correctAnswer: I will have been living here for ten years before I move.
questions.explanation: Quick: স্থানান্তরের আগে ১০ বছর বসবাসের দীর্ঘ ভবিষ্যৎ ঘটনা বোঝাতে 'will have been living' সঠিক।

questions.question: Choose the correct verb: 'The baby ____ since morning before she falls asleep.'
questions.explanation: Quick: ঘুমিয়ে পড়ার আগে সকাল থেকে কাঁদার কাজ — 'will have been crying' (Future Perfect Continuous)।

questions.question: Which sentence is grammatically correct (for vs since)?
options: I will have been waiting for two hours before she arrives.
I will have been waiting since two hours before she arrives.
I was waiting since two hours before she arrives.
I will have waiting for two hours before she arrives.
questions.correctAnswer: I will have been waiting for two hours before she arrives.
questions.explanation: Quick: সময়ের পরিমাণ (two hours) থাকলে 'for' বসে এবং ভবিষ্যতের আগের দীর্ঘ কাজ বোঝাতে 'will have been waiting' সঠিক।

questions.question: Choose the correct sentence with 'since':
options: He will have been working since Monday before he resigns.
He will have been working for Monday before he resigns.
He was working since Monday before he resigns.
He has been working since Monday before he resigns.
questions.correctAnswer: He will have been working since Monday before he resigns.
questions.explanation: নির্দিষ্ট দিনের আগে 'since' বসে এবং পদত্যাগের আগের দীর্ঘ কাজের ধারাবাহিকতা বোঝাতে 'will have been working' সঠিক।

questions.question: Which sentence is grammatically correct?
options: She will have been swimming in the pool.
She will have been swiming in the pool.
She will have been swim in the pool.
She will have swimming in the pool.
questions.correctAnswer: She will have been swimming in the pool.
questions.explanation: Quick: 'swim'-এর সঠিক double 'm' যুক্ত ing রূপ হলো 'swimming'। তাই 'She will have been swimming' বাক্যটি সঠিক।
